rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies that the placeholder `True` fields in `ReductiveGroup` and `SemisimpleGroup` — confirmed in the diff at lines 63 and 68 — will create breaking changes with no deprecation path when follow-up PRs supply real conditions; adding an experimental marker is a real, low-cost improvement. Review 2's clean approve, while technically accurate about no existing API being deprecated, misses this material forward-looking risk.
